skills.name: greetings_vocabulary
skills.description: Hello, Hi, Good morning/afternoon/evening, Goodbye, How are you, Fine thank you.

skills.name: numbers_1_to_20
skills.description: One through twenty in English, written form.

skills.name: colors_basic
skills.description: Red, blue, green, yellow, white, black, orange, purple.

skills.name: family_vocabulary
skills.description: Mother, father, brother, sister, grandmother, grandfather, uncle, aunt, cousin.

skills.name: daily_routine_verbs
skills.description: Wake up, eat, drink, go, come, work, sleep, brush, wash, read.

skills.name: home_and_city_vocabulary
skills.description: Rooms: bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, living room. Places: school, hospital, market, park, mosque.

skills.name: verb_to_be_present
skills.description: I am, you are, he/she/it is, we are, they are. Positive and negative forms.

skills.name: present_simple_positive
skills.description: I eat, he eats, she goes. Third-person -s and -es rules. have/has exception.

skills.name: present_simple_negative
skills.description: I don't, she doesn't. Don't vs doesn't.

skills.name: present_simple_question
skills.description: Do you? Does she? Short answers. Wh- questions: What, Where, When, Who, How.

skills.name: basic_reading_comprehension
skills.description: Read 5–6 sentence texts. Answer who/what/where/when questions. Identify words in context.

common_error_tags_glossary.confusion_am_is_are: Student uses wrong form of 'to be' (e.g., I is, She am).
common_error_tags_glossary.subject_verb_agreement_error: Verb form does not agree with subject number or person.
common_error_tags_glossary.wrong_verb_form: Using -ing, past, or base where another form is needed.
common_error_tags_glossary.third_person_s_confusion: Forgetting to add -s/-es with he/she/it in present simple.
common_error_tags_glossary.missing_auxiliary: Omitting do/does in questions or don't/doesn't in negatives.
common_error_tags_glossary.do_does_confusion: Using 'do' with he/she/it or 'does' with I/you/we/they.
common_error_tags_glossary.wrong_negative_form: Incorrect negative construction (e.g., 'she don't' instead of 'she doesn't').
common_error_tags_glossary.there_is_are_confusion: Using 'there is' with plural or 'there are' with singular.
common_error_tags_glossary.his_her_confusion: Using 'his' for female or 'her' for male referent.
common_error_tags_glossary.wh_word_confusion: Choosing wrong wh- word for the type of question.
common_error_tags_glossary.family_term_confusion: Confusing family member terms (uncle/aunt, cousin, etc.).
common_error_tags_glossary.spelling_error: Incorrect spelling of a known vocabulary word.
common_error_tags_glossary.reading_comprehension_error: Incorrect answer based on misreading the text.
common_error_tags_glossary.number_confusion: Confusing similar number words (fifteen vs fifty).
common_error_tags_glossary.irregular_verb_error: Applying regular rules to irregular verbs (e.g., 'haves' instead of 'has').
common_error_tags_glossary.false_cognate_arabic: Interference from Arabic that leads to wrong English form.
common_error_tags_glossary.omitted_subject_pronoun: Arabic allows dropping subject pronouns; students may do same in English.
